Name: Label
Description: A display label for the NCubeScheme.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the NCubeScheme.

Name: NCubeReference
Description: Describes the logical structure of an NCube which is a 1..n dimension structure which relates a set of individual value to each other by defining them within a matrix.

Name: NCubeGroupReference
Description: Describes a group of NCubes for conceptual or administrative purposes, which may be ordered or hierarchical.

Name: NCubeSchemeReference
Description: Allows for inclusion of other NCube schemes by reference.
